title: apophragma tenuifolium
intro: Apophragma tenuifolium, also known as Chinese snake root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Apophragma tenuifolium include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Apophragma tenuifolium is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
